General.Name: Culturecom Holdings Ltd
General.Description: Culturecom Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, operates as a comic book publishers and media content provider in Hong Kong and the People's Republic of China. It operates through Publishing and Intellectual Properties (IPs) Licensing; Digital Marketing; Retailing and Wholesales; and Natural Language Processing segments. The Publishing and Intellectual Properties Licensing segment publishes comic books, as well as licenses IPs of comics. The Digital Marketing segment provides digital marketing and communication services; and IPs digitalization and agency services. The Retailing and Wholesales segment is involved in retailing of wine. The Natural Language Processing segment offers artificial intelligence (AI) speech technology solutions in real-time human interaction field, including design and implementation in software and embedded chipset domains. It also owns comic titles across various genres and the catalogue spans, including martial arts action and contemporary romance. In addition, the company engages in securities trading activities; trading of wine; and provision of management services. Culturecom Holdings Limited was incorporated in 1993 and is headquartered in Admiralty, Hong Kong.
General.Address: Far East Finance Centre, Admiralty, Hong Kong
